nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 乌干达
nodes.summary: 乌干达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Elgon francolin、Shelley's francolin等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Spotted palm thrush
nodes.summary: Spotted palm thrush（Spotted palm thrush，学名 Cichladusa guttata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They are small birds mostly consisting of the colors brown, black, and cream. They can be found in eastern African countries such as Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Sudan, Tanzania, and Uganda.BirdLife International (2018)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They can also be found in the easternmost parts of the Democratic Republic of the Congo, and the southernmost parts of Sudan. These birds commonly dwell in habitats along the dense undergrowth within savannas, woodland, dry watercourses, thickets, and scrub habitats
